recommendations.title: The Unsaid
recommendations.overview: A doctor dealing with the aftermath of his son's death tries to help a troubled young man.

recommendations.title: Jason Lives - Friday the 13th Part VI
recommendations.overview: Tommy Jarvis, tormented by the fear that maybe Jason isn't really dead, unwittingly resurrects the mass murderer for another bloody rampage.

recommendations.title: Sometimes They Come Back

recommendations.title: Date with an Angel
recommendations.overview: Aspiring composer Jim Sanders is engaged to spoiled rich girl Patty. But the morning after his bachelor party, Jim wakes up to discover a beautiful, broken-winged angel in his pool. When everyone finds out about his heavenly houseguest, Jim must cope

recommendations.title: Dark City
recommendations.overview: A man struggles with memories of his past, including a wife he cannot remember, in a nightmarish world with no sun and run by beings with telekinetic powers who seek the souls of humans.

recommendations.title: Lord, Give Me Patience
recommendations.overview: An ultraconservative family father must spend a weekend with his dysfunctional children for the burial of his wife.

recommendations.title: Barbarian
recommendations.overview: In town for a job interview, a young woman arrives at her Airbnb late at night only to find that it has been mistakenly double-booked and a strange man is already staying there. Against her better judgement, she decides to stay the night anyway.

recommendations.title: The Medusa Touch
recommendations.overview: A French detective in London reconstructs the life of a man lying in hospital with severe injuries with the help of journals and a psychiatrist. He realises that the man had powerful telekinetic abilities.

recommendations.title: Believe Me: The Abduction of Lisa McVey

recommendations.title: Doctor Sleep
